scripts.emulators:exec: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,storage,functions "pnpm run test:security:inner"
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only firestore,storage "node --test tests/emulator/firestore-security.test.mjs && node --test tests/emulator/storage-security.test.mjs"
scripts.test:frontend:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs --local-defaults && node tests/emulator/frontend-emulator-smoke.mjs"
scripts.test:ui:login: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs --local-defaults && node tests/emulator/ui/login.smoke.mjs && node tests/emulator/ui/profiles.smoke.mjs"
scripts.test:ui:flows: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs --local-defaults && node tests/emulator/ui/pedidos.flow.mjs && node tests/emulator/ui/atendimento-templates.flow.mjs && node tests/emulator/ui/crm-base-ia.flow.mjs && node tests/emulator/ui/ia-copilot.flow.mjs"
scripts.test:ui:responsive: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-vide-hub --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs --local-defaults && node tests/emulator/ui/responsive.smoke.mjs"
scripts.test:security: pnpm run test:rules && pnpm run test:functions
scripts.test:security:inner: node --test tests/emulator/firestore-security.test.mjs && node --test tests/emulator/storage-security.test.mjs && pnpm run test:functions
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run test:central-ia && pnpm run test:base-conhecimento && pnpm run test:atendimento && pnpm run test:templates-atendimento && pnpm run test:pedidos-estruturados && pnpm run test:crm360 && pnpm run test:ia-copilot && pnpm run test:ia-negocio && pnpm run test:vide-context && pnpm run test:studio
scripts.test:all: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:security && pnpm run test:frontend:emulator
scripts.test:release: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run test:ui:login && pnpm run test:ui:flows && pnpm run test:ui:responsive
scripts.check: node --check central-ia.js && node --check base-conhecimento-ia.js && node --check atendimento.js && node --check templates-atendimento.js && node --check pedidos-estruturados.js &&
